questionHtml: State one factor, other than BMI, that increases the risk of CHD.
markschemeHtml:
increased triglycerides/cholesterol in the blood
OR
presence of plaque/atherosclerosis «in arteries»
OR
high blood pressure/hypertension
OR
sedentary lifestyle/lack of exercise
OR
genetic/hereditary factor
OR
smoking
OR
age
OR
diet

meta.title: State one factor, other than BMI, that increases the risk of CHD.
